creator: freebsd@schooljan.nl
text:
net-mgmt/unifi5 version 5.7.23 now depends on an amd64-only port (databases/mongodb34), leaving people stuck on 5.7.20 on i386 systems (I'm using a low power 32-bit system for these kind of network tasks, I would rather keep using it). Was this a requirement from upstream?

Regards,

Henno
